docs: update Docker registry references from Docker Hub to GHCR (#1587)

Thanks for assigning this issue to me. I'm starting to work on it and
will keep this PR's description up to date as I form a plan and make
progress.

<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

> 
> ----
> 
> *This section details on the original issue you should resolve*
> 
> <issue_title>Docs: Fix outdated Docker registry instructions (Docker
Hub -> GHCR)</issue_title>
> <issue_description>### Background
> Currently, the GitHub Actions workflow (`.github/workflows/build.yml`)
publishes the Manael Docker image to GitHub Container Registry
(`ghcr.io/manaelproxy/manael`).
> However, the official documentation states that the image is published
on Docker Hub and instructs users to pull `manael/manael:latest`. This
mismatch causes confusion and potential `image not found` errors for new
users.
> 
> ### Proposal
> Update the installation documentation to point to the correct GitHub
Container Registry (GHCR).
> 
> ### Tasks
> - Update the "Using Docker" section in
`website/content/en/docs/installation.md`.
> - Update the "Docker を使う" section in
`website/content/ja/docs/installation.md`.
> 
> ### Example Update (English)
> **From:**
> ```markdown
> A Docker image for running Manael is published on [Docker
Hub](https://hub.docker.com/).
> 
> Get the image with `docker pull manael/manael:latest` command before
running Manael with Docker.
> ```
> 
> **To:**
> ```markdown
> A Docker image for running Manael is published on [GitHub Container
Registry
(GHCR)](https://github.com/manaelproxy/manael/pkgs/container/manael).
> 
> Get the image with `docker pull ghcr.io/manaelproxy/manael:latest`
command before running Manael with Docker.
> ```</issue_description>
> 
> ## Comments on the Issue (you are @copilot in this section)

> </comments>
>

fix: only set CdnImageBase when ThumbnailUrl is actually a CDN URL

Prevents events with old S3/non-CDN thumbnailUrls from trying to render
via CDN paths that don't have matching originals in the image bucket.

The API pod uses the EKS node instance profile (ticket-platform-eks-node-role)
to sign presigned PUT URLs. Without s3:PutObject on the image bucket the
browser's direct-to-S3 upload returned 403 AccessDenied, leaving the bucket
empty and the CDN returning 404.

Fix quiz auto-advance, activity tracking, and audio playback

Bug 1 - Auto-advance: Inject VocabularyQuizPreferences and add
Task.Delay-based auto-advance after showing the answer. Cancels

Fix ReadCommandInput exclusivity crash — use ReadKey loop (#1102)

Replaces AnsiConsole.Prompt(TextPrompt) with a direct ReadKey loop.
AnsiConsole.Live().Start() holds DefaultExclusivityMode for its entire
lifetime; PauseAndRun does not release it. ReadKey bypasses exclusivity
entirely, allowing input while Live display keeps rendering.

Fixes #1101

Patch 070: NaN guard for UnitClip in iccApplyProfiles (CWE-758)

Upstream iccApplyProfiles.cpp UnitClip() passes NaN through to
(icUInt8Number)/(icUInt16Number) casts — undefined behavior per C++ standard.
NaN fails both v<0.0 and v>1.0 comparisons (IEEE 754 NaN != NaN).

Fix: if (v!=v) return 0.0; — the standard NaN self-inequality idiom.

8 of first 100 fuzzer corpus files trigger the upstream UBSAN at:
- iccApplyProfiles.cpp:559-560 (UnitClip → unsigned char/short cast)

56 active patches total. Next: 071.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: replace manual packadd with lze dep_of/on_require specs

Instead of calling vim.cmd.packadd() inside after hooks, use lze's
built-in dependency handlers:
- dep_of = parent  → lze loads the dep before parent's packadd
- on_require = mod → lze loads the plugin when require(mod.*) is called
- dep_of on lazydev.nvim → loads before blink.cmp in addition to ft=lua

New lua/plugins/deps.lua centralises all dependency specs:
  nui.nvim        dep_of noice.nvim
  promise-async   dep_of nvim-ufo
  blink-copilot   dep_of blink.cmp
  SchemaStore.nvim dep_of nvim-lspconfig
  nvim-treesitter-endwise dep_of nvim-treesitter
  plenary.nvim    on_require plenary

Also fixes redundant self-packadd inside resolved-nvim's own after hook.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(binding-explorer): use IndexOf instead of LastIndexOf for type/value separator

parseBinding used LastIndexOf('=') to find the type/value separator after the
colon, which failed when values contained '=' (anonymous records, ref cells,
quoted strings). Changed to IndexOf('=') since FSI output format guarantees
the FIRST '=' after ':' is always the type/value separator.

Added 19 new tests (22 total):
- 3 property-based roundtrip tests (FsCheck)
- 4 bug fix tests including property for =-containing values
- 8 edge case tests (it binding, generics, tuples, function types)

commit.message:
Fix NES002 false positive on static classes (#135)

* Fix NES002 false positive on static classes

The NES002 analyzer unconditionally flagged every class declaration,
including static classes. Static classes are just containers for static
methods and don't involve heap allocation or objects, so they should be
allowed.

This fixes the CI build failure for the multifile sample, where
Display and Palette are static helper classes.

feat: v0.2.0 — AI-powered memos summarization (#7)

* feat: v0.2.0 — AI-powered memos summarization

- Add pluggable AI provider layer (Ollama + Claude API) with config file fallback
- Add 5 built-in summarization templates (meeting-notes, action-items, summary, key-decisions, brainstorm) + user-defined templates via ~/.config/pippin/templates/
- Add transcript cache (SQLite via GRDB) to avoid re-transcribing on repeat summarize runs
- Add `pippin memos summarize` subcommand with --template, --prompt, --provider, --model, --all, --output flags
- Add `pippin memos templates {list,show,add}` subcommand
- Add `pippin memos delete --force` (writable DB connection + audio file removal + cache clear)
- Add --format flag to `pippin memos export` (txt/srt/markdown/rtf sidecars)
- Add 34 new tests (AIProviderTests, TemplateTests, TranscriptCacheTests, SummarizeTests)
- Bump version to 0.2.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update pippin/AIProvider/AIProviderFactory.swift

tryGetSecret includes a hard-coded absolute path under /Users/matthewwagner/... This is user-specific and will be dead code for everyone else.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update pippin/AIProvider/AIProvider.swift

On timeout, sendSynchronousRequest throws but the underlying URLSessionDataTask is left running. This can waste resources and keep sockets open. Keep a reference to the task and call task.cancel() when the semaphore wait times out (and consider cancelling on early error paths as well).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update pippin/MemosBridge/VoiceMemosDB.swift

deleteMemo always uses defaultRecordingsDir() to locate the audio file, even when a custom dbPath is supplied. If dbPath points at a different container/location, the computed audioPath will be wrong. Derive the recordings directory from path (e.g., deletingLastPathComponent) to stay consistent with VoiceMemosDB.init.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update pippin/Commands/SummarizeCommand.swift

The transcript cache provider value is being set from the --provider flag, but that flag represents the AI summarization provider (ollama/claude), not the transcription backend used by TranscriberFactory.makeDefault().

* Update pippin/MemosBridge/VoiceMemosDB.swift

SummarizeResult.provider is derived from the CLI --provider flag, which can be nil even when the factory selects a provider from config defaults. This can misreport the actual provider used (e.g., config chooses claude but result says ollama).

commit.message:
v2: energy-gated VAD, streaming TTS, local Whisper, converse tool

Major improvements:
- Energy-gated VAD: auto-calibrates ambient noise floor (~0.5s),
  requires speech to be 2.5x louder than background to trigger.
  Dramatically reduces false positives from background chatter.
- Streaming TTS: pipes Azure audio to aplay as chunks arrive
  instead of buffering full response — starts speaking sooner.
- Local Whisper: offline STT via faster-whisper (CPU, base model).
  No network needed, ~2s transcription after recording stops.
- Converse tool: signals voice chat loop intent to Copilot,
  prompting listen -> speak -> listen cycle.
- Shared record_with_vad() utility for DRY recording logic.

New dep: faster-whisper

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
